name: structured-description
input: this branch has 3 commits relative to main: feat login, fix null pointer in login validation, docs update README; the diffstat shows 4 files changed

expect.rubric: The PR description includes: a one-sentence title, ## Summary (2-4 bullets making clear what changed and why), ## Test Plan (checkable verification steps); summarizes only the given commits and changes, without inventing changes that did not happen.
